title: Reusable Sports Editorial Poster
sourceTitle: The Last Roar Magazine Cover Editorial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable sports editorial poster with sports editorial poster with dynamic athlete energy, bold graphic composition, and crisp campaign polish. A high-quality Korean-style commercial photograph, in the style of a premium sports magazine cover. Composition and Pose: Half-body portrait (from mid-torso upward), slightly angled frontal view. hero athlete poster language Fictional Athlete: fictional elite number-seven forward seen from behind. Sport Context: international tournament night with cheering supporters and cinematic stadium lights. Kit. Palette: deep red, forest green, white trim, and gold accent details. Hero Pose: back-view walkout pose with shoulders squared and boots planted on wet grass. Stadium Mood: epic pre-match atmosphere with mist, flares, and shallow depth of field. Headline Text: THE LAST ROAR. Subject: Make fictional elite number-seven forward seen from behind the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: A high-quality Korean-style commercial photograph, in the style of a premium sports magazine cover. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use hero sports poster structure with jersey silhouette, stadium atmosphere, dramatic rim light, and strong headline area. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in cinematic sports-magazine cover finish with realistic fabric, rain/mist particles, and polished contrast. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use deep red, forest green, white trim, and gold accent details. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: The Last Roar Magazine Cover Editorial Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable sports editorial poster with sports editorial poster with dynamic athlete energy, bold graphic composition, and crisp campaign polish. A high-quality Korean-style commercial photograph, in the style of a premium sports magazine cover. Composition and Pose: Half-body portrait (from mid-torso upward), slightly angled frontal view. hero athlete poster language Fictional Athlete: invented national-team captain lifting his collar before kickoff. Sport Context: summer 2026 football finals poster without real federation marks. Kit. Palette: navy, ice blue, white, and silver. Hero Pose: three-quarter heroic stance holding the ball at hip height. Stadium Mood: movie-poster backlight, crowd bokeh, rain particles, and dramatic rim light. Headline Text: ONE MORE MATCH. Subject: Make invented national-team captain lifting his collar before kickoff the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

Composition and Pose: Half-body portrait (from mid-torso upward), slightly angled frontal view. hero athlete poster language Fictional Athlete: fictional elite number-seven forward seen from behind. Sport Context: international tournament night with cheering supporters and cinematic stadium lights. Kit. Palette: deep red, forest green, white trim, and gold accent details. Hero Pose: back-view walkout pose with shoulders squared and boots planted on wet grass. Stadium Mood: epic pre-match atmosphere with mist, flares, and shallow depth of field. Headline Text: THE LAST ROAR. Subject: Make fictional elite number-seven forward seen from behind the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: A high-quality Korean-style commercial photograph, in the style of a premium sports magazine cover. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use hero sports poster structure with jersey silhouette, stadium atmosphere, dramatic rim light, and strong headline area. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in cinematic sports-magazine cover finish with realistic fabric, rain/mist particles, and polished contrast. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use deep red, forest green, white trim, and gold accent details. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
